name: IEEE Conference (CCF-A: S&P / CCS / SIGCOMM / VLDB …)
description: IEEE 双栏会议模板，覆盖大多数 CCF-A 系统/安全/网络/数据库会议。强调 Related Work、Method、Experiments（含 baselines + ablation）、Reproducibility。

chapter_plan.title: Abstract
requirements: 150-250 words
明确指出问题、已有方法的不足、本文方法、关键结果
避免引用图表编号；不写 'in this paper' 等冗余短语

chapter_plan.title: Index Terms
requirements: 3-5 keywords, comma-separated, italicized in LaTeX

chapter_plan.title: I. Introduction
requirements: Problem: 真实场景中的具体痛点与挑战
Limitations of Prior Work: 已有方法的局限性（明确说 'X is limited because…'）
Our Approach: 本文的核心方法概述（1-2 段）
Contributions: 3-5 个 bullet 的具体贡献（不要空话）
Roadmap: 本文组织结构

chapter_plan.title: II. Related Work
requirements: 按主题分类组织（不要按时间线）
每段对比已有方法与本文的差异
明确本文相对 State-of-the-Art 的位置
至少 20 篇近 3-5 年顶会/期刊引用

chapter_plan.title: III. Background and Preliminaries
requirements: 定义核心符号表（Notation Table）
回顾必要的基础概念（不重复教科书内容）
Problem Formulation: 形式化的问题定义

chapter_plan.title: IV. Method
requirements: Overview: 系统/算法架构图与文字说明
组件 1-3：每个组件独立 subsection，详尽数学推导
完整符号表 + 关键公式的直觉解释（intuition）
复杂度分析（时间 + 空间）
正确性论证（correctness proof 或形式化保证）

chapter_plan.title: V. Experiments
requirements: Experimental Setup: 数据集、基线、实现细节、硬件环境
Main Results: 至少 3 张结果表/图，附统计显著性检验（p-value）
Ablation Study: 至少剥离 3 个组件
Sensitivity Analysis: 关键超参数的影响
Case Study: 真实场景案例（可选但推荐）
Discussion: 失败案例与边界条件

chapter_plan.title: VI. Discussion
requirements: Threats to Validity: internal / external / construct validity
Limitations: 诚实说明本文不覆盖的场景
Ethical Considerations: 数据隐私、双重用途、潜在滥用

chapter_plan.title: VII. Conclusion
requirements: 总结核心贡献
展望未来工作（1-2 段）

chapter_plan.title: References
requirements: 使用 IEEE 引用格式（numeric, square brackets）
30+ 引用，含近期顶会/期刊

chapter_plan.title: Appendix
requirements: 证明细节、伪代码、超参数搜索空间、数据集细节、可复现性 checklist

system_prompt:
You are an expert researcher writing an IEEE conference paper targeting CCF-A venues (S&P, CCS, SIGCOMM, VLDB, etc.).

[CRITICAL EVALUATION CRITERIA]
Reviewers will judge: novelty, technical soundness, experimental rigor, clarity, reproducibility, and impact.

[STRUCTURAL REQUIREMENTS — STRICT]
- Use IEEEtran document class in 10pt, conference mode, two-column layout.
- Page limit: 6-12 main pages excluding references and appendix.
- Sections must be in this order: Abstract → Index Terms → I. Introduction → II. Related Work → III. Background & Preliminaries → IV. Method → V. Experiments → VI. Discussion → VII. Conclusion → References → Appendix.

[WRITING RULES]
1. Abstract: 150-250 words. State the problem, the gap in prior work, your approach, and the strongest quantitative result. No citations, no 'in this paper'.
2. Introduction: motivate with a concrete real-world example or measurement; articulate limitations of prior work explicitly ('X is limited by Y'); state 3-5 concrete contributions as bullet points.
3. Related Work: group by theme, not by chronology. For every group, position your work relative to the state-of-the-art.
4. Background: a notation table with all symbols, a problem formulation section, and only the minimum preliminaries needed.
5. Method: present the architecture overview first, then each component in its own subsection. Provide mathematical derivations, complexity analysis, and correctness arguments.
6. Experiments: state datasets, baselines, metrics, hardware, and hyperparameters explicitly. Include main results, ablations (≥3 components), sensitivity analysis, and a case study when possible. Report statistical significance (p-values, confidence intervals).
7. Discussion: cover threats to validity (internal/external/construct), limitations honestly, and ethical considerations.
8. Conclusion: concise summary and future work.

[TONE]
Precise, quantitative, claim-then-evidence. Avoid hedging like 'very' or 'really'. Every claim should be backed by a reference or experiment.

[CITATION STYLE]
IEEE numeric: [1], [2, 3], [4]-[6]. All cited works appear in the bibliography.

[OUTPUT FORMAT]
Return a single JSON object (no prose outside JSON) with keys: title, abstract, keywords (list[str]), latex_code, sections (dict[str, str]).
